frontend.styling: Vanilla CSS with CSS Custom Properties (design tokens)
frontend.stateManagement: Server-side JSON file store (lib/data/store.ts) with server actions

routing.middleware: Clerk middleware protecting all routes except /sign-in* and /sign-up*

(auth).description: Public auth pages using Clerk components

(dashboard).layout: App shell with top bar, main container, and bottom navigation

/.name: Home / Supervisor Overview
/.description: Dashboard landing page with hero card, 3 metric cards (Sessions today, Active alerts, Missed tasks), and current session panel with live link

/monitoring.name: Monitoring
/monitoring.description: Two-cow-position visual grid (40 cells each, 5x8) with color-coded pressure status indicators (success/warning/danger), system status panel showing inference service connection state

/pressure.name: Pressure (placeholder)
/pressure.description: Linked in bottom nav but no dedicated page file exists - likely future implementation

/alerts.name: Alerts
/alerts.description: List of compliance alerts with severity levels (critical/warning/info) indicated by left border color, static mock data

/recommendations.name: Recommandations (French)
/recommendations.description: Clinical guidance panel showing risk level (Critique) and repositioning/care instructions, gradient background card

/reports.name: Reports
/reports.description: ReportGenerator component for creating DOCX reports via /api/reports/generate, list of recent reports with download links

/settings.name: Paramètres (Settings)
/settings.description: Supervisor profile, clinical threshold slider (20-60), notification toggle with status indicator

/sessions/new.name: New Session
/sessions/new.description: Multi-step session creation form (MultiStepSessionForm component) - stepper wizard for session configuration

/sessions/[sessionId].name: Session Detail
/sessions/[sessionId].description: Detailed session view with task checklist, cow process status, and override capabilities

/sessions/[sessionId]/live.name: Live Session View
/sessions/[sessionId]/live.description: Real-time monitoring with EventSource connection to /api/ws, live event feed, task checklist with override modal

shared.Button: Primary (blue) / Secondary (white with border) variants, rounded-12px
shared.Input: Text, textarea, select with 8px radius, border-gray
shared.Card: White background, 1px border, 16px radius, subtle shadow
shared.Label: Uppercase, 12px, 600 weight, muted color, letter-spacing
shared.NavCard: Flex justify-between, padded card for list items

dashboard.LiveSessionBanner: Live indicator with pulsing green dot, 'Active' metric, gradient left border
dashboard.TaskChecklist: 6 milking tasks (TASK-01 to TASK-06: Pre-cleaning, Stripping, Machine attachment, Milking, Detachment, Post-dip), status badges, override button per task
dashboard.OverrideModal: Modal for manual task status correction (completed/missed/anomaly_flagged/unverifiable) with reason textarea, posts to /api/task-events/[id]/override
dashboard.SessionActions: Employee reassignment form with PATCH to /api/sessions/[id]/employee
dashboard.LiveSessionStream: EventSource client connecting to /api/ws?session_id=, displays last 8 events in real-time

forms.MultiStepSessionForm: Stepper wizard for session creation (exported from ui/index.ts)

reports.ReportGenerator: Client component calling POST /api/reports/generate with session_id, shows download link on success

/api/sessions/[sessionId]/employee.PATCH: Reassign employee to session, creates audit log

/api/events/ingest.POST: Ingest events from inference service (Bearer token auth, rate limited 120/min), publishes to real-time broadcast

/api/task-events/[taskEventId]/override.PATCH: Manual task status override with reason, creates audit log

/api/reports/generate.POST: Generate DOCX report for session (docx-generator.ts), returns file URL

/api/ws.GET: Server-Sent Events endpoint for real-time session events, filters by session_id query param

dataLayer.seedData: Pre-populated with session-1042, 2 cow processes, 2 task events, 1 report

authentication.protection: Middleware protects all routes except /sign-in* and /sign-up*
authentication.issue: Route conflict: /sign-in page exists in both (auth) group and [[...sign-in]] catch-all causing Next.js error

endpoints: POST /session-window - Start processing session (RTSP stream, YOLOv8, task state machine)

stylingFiles.globals.css: Complete design token system, layout utilities, component classes, animations
stylingFiles.approach: CSS-first with custom properties, no Tailwind/Styled Components

knownIssues: Clerk route conflict: /sign-in defined in both app/(auth)/sign-in/page.tsx and app/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx
Bottom nav includes '/pressure' route but no page exists
Middleware has unused clerkMiddleware import and empty middleware() export
Store is JSON file (not production DB) - Drizzle schema exists but store.ts uses file I/O
French/English mixed content (Recommandations, Paramètres, Alertes vs English elsewhere)

apps/web.app: Next.js App Router pages and API routes
apps/web.components: React components (dashboard, forms, reports, ui exports)

lib.db: Drizzle ORM schema (7 tables) and client
lib.data: JSON file store with TypeScript types
lib.inference-client: Session window notification to inference service
